reviews.author: Flicwork
reviews.text: Fantastic views as the landscape open up. A few stalls with food. Flicwork is also on Instagram

reviews.author: Yang Kevin
reviews.text: It is one of the most stunning passes in Northwest of Vietnam. Great ride on the motorbike.

reviews.author: Michael Someck
reviews.text: I’ve seen my fair share of stunning scenery while driving through Vietnam, so it should say something when I say that my jaw dropped while driving this pass. There’s a spot maybe 1km beyond the pin in google (if heading north) that has an incredible spot to stop for photos. Make sure to stop and take in the incredible view. It’s worth it.

reviews.author: Huynh Nguyen
reviews.text: Along the length of Khau Phạ Pass are dozens of sharp bends, and the pass is especially dangerous for driving on foggy days as there is no barrier or warning sign. The pass has deteriorated much due to the lack of regular maintenance, and the land is easily eroded since the pass is situated upon weak red basalt soil foundation. Adding to that is the constant danger of falling stones from the mountains.

reviews.author: thuha pham
reviews.text: Wonderful view to Tu le field from here, and must stop point on the way to Mu cang chai district. Excelent location for the panoramic view.

reviews.author: Xi Nguyen
reviews.text: One of Four Great Pass you guys should go in Vietnam

reviews.author: VISIT MY AMAZING VIETNAM
reviews.text: This place has a very convenient hill to play Paragliding.

reviews.text: Khau Pha Pass has the weather like Da Lat

reviews.text: This is a great road. Very scenic and well maintained. This is where the North really begins.
